payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the active current memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was excluded because it is superseded by mem_new, so showing mem_old as current would risk presenting outdated information.

entity_resolution.reason: The recall context identifies Sam from Goldman; mem_new and mem_old refer to the same intended Sam context, with mem_old marked superseded.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new was returned because it is the current, non-superseded memory for Sam from Goldman.
mem_old was filtered out because it has been superseded by mem_new and should not be presented as current.

details: Explained why mem_old was filtered as superseded.
Did not present mem_old as current fact.

repair_options: If mem_old was incorrectly marked superseded, remove or revise the supersession link.
If mem_new is incorrect, correct mem_new and keep mem_old filtered unless it becomes current again.
If Sam from Goldman is ambiguous, split or clarify the entity identity before recall.
